transcript: Hi, this is Maria Garcia, date of birth March 2nd, 1971. I'm calling because I'm running low on my Lisinopril, the ten milligram one, and I was hoping to get a refill. You can reach me at 415-555-0142. Thank you so much.

transcript: Hi, this is Daniel Foster, date of birth, uh, August 9th, 1974. transcript: Hi, this is Karen Diaz, DOB June 3rd, 1991. I'm calling to refill my alprazolam, the point five milligram. I'm almost out. You can reach me at 415-555-0147. Thank you.
